name: Orchestrator Internal Marketplace
description: Internal plugin marketplace for the orchestrator repo. Provides the Contract-Router orchestration pipeline and Windows dev toolkit.

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Contract-Router multi-agent orchestration pipeline. Coordinates 8 specialized agents across the full development lifecycle using YAML task contracts.

plugins.name: windows-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: PowerShell dev tool wrappers for Windows — file search, git ops, Node.js, Angular, .NET, Python, Rust, Go, Ruby. Hardened for non-interactive AI agent execution.
